content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Completed the drain-loop remediations for pending resume handling and Rerun recovery. The drain orchestration now carries `DrainCreatedProject` metadata from project creation into queued resume work, restores the saved feature branch before `resume_run`, and accepts the currently claimed bead when its status is `in_progress` as well as `open`. The process drain port now returns the created branch name and switches back to it during resume context restoration. `RecoveryAction::Rerun` is now treated as a drain-layer no-op/continue path instead of aborting the whole drain, matching the contract that CI-flake reruns belong to PR watch. Added/updated isolated drain tests for branch restoration, in-progress resume status, and Rerun no-op behavior.","outstanding_risks":["The workspace still has modified `.ralph-burning/projects/vl8z-1/` orchestration state files; they were left untouched and are outside review scope.","`cargo test --locked` passes but emits pre-existing unu

## Steps

1. [Completed] codex implementation turn
